---
title: "04_model_expression"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 1. Load packages and processed data
#--------------------------------------------------

library(tidyverse)
library(here)
library(caret)
library(glmnet)
library(pROC)
library(ranger)

x_expression <- read_rds(here("data", "processed", "x_expression.rds"))
y_expression <- read_rds(here("data", "processed", "y_expression.rds"))

```


```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 2. Prepare modelling inputs
#--------------------------------------------------

x_expression <- x_expression %>%
  mutate(across(everything(), as.numeric))

y_expression <- factor(y_expression, levels = c("No", "Yes"))

table(y_expression)
```

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 3. Train control
#--------------------------------------------------

set.seed(123)

ctrl <- trainControl(
  method = "repeatedcv",
  number = 5,
  repeats = 5,
  classProbs = TRUE,
  summaryFunction = twoClassSummary,
  savePredictions = "final"
)
```

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 4. Elastic net model
#--------------------------------------------------

enet_grid <- expand.grid(
  alpha = seq(0,1, by = 0.1),
  lambda = 10^seq(-4, 2, length.out = 50)
)

set.seed(123)

model_enet_expr <- train(
  x = x_expression,
  y = y_expression,
  method = "glmnet",
  metric = "ROC",
  trControl = ctrl,
  tuneGrid = enet_grid
)

print(model_enet_expr)
print(model_enet_expr$bestTune)
```

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 5. Random forest model
#--------------------------------------------------

set.seed(123)

rf_grid <- expand.grid(
  mtry = c(5, 10, 20, 35, 50, 75, 100, 150, 250, 400),
  splitrule = "gini",
  min.node.size = c(1, 3, 5, 10, 15, 20)
)

model_rf_expr <- train(
  x = x_expression,
  y = y_expression,
  method = "ranger",
  metric = "ROC",
  trControl = ctrl,
  tuneGrid = rf_grid,
  num.trees = 1000,
  importance = "impurity"
)

print(model_rf_expr)
print(model_rf_expr$bestTune)
```

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 6. Compare cross-validated results
#--------------------------------------------------

expr_resamples <- resamples(
  list(
    ElasticNet = model_enet_expr,
    RandomForest = model_rf_expr
  )
)

summary(expr_resamples)

expr_model_summary <- bind_rows(
  model_enet_expr$results %>%
    mutate(model = "ElasticNet") %>%
    filter(
      alpha == model_enet_expr$bestTune$alpha,
      lambda == model_enet_expr$bestTune$lambda
    ),
  model_rf_expr$results %>%
    mutate(model = "RandomForest") %>%
    filter(
      mtry == model_rf_expr$bestTune$mtry,
      splitrule == model_rf_expr$bestTune$splitrule,
      min.node.size == model_rf_expr$bestTune$min.node.size
    )
)

print(expr_model_summary)

write_csv(
  expr_model_summary,
  here("outputs", "tables", "expression_model_summary.csv")
)
```

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 7. Extract saved predictions for best tuning parameters
#--------------------------------------------------

enet_pred <- model_enet_expr$pred %>%
  filter(
    alpha == model_enet_expr$bestTune$alpha,
    lambda == model_enet_expr$bestTune$lambda
  ) %>%
  mutate(model = "ElasticNet")

rf_pred <- model_rf_expr$pred %>%
  filter(
    mtry == model_rf_expr$bestTune$mtry
  ) %>%
  mutate(model = "RandomForest")

expr_predictions <- bind_rows(enet_pred, rf_pred)

write_csv(
  expr_predictions,
  here("outputs", "tables", "expression_cv_predictions.csv")
)
```

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 8. Compute AUC from saved CV predictions
#--------------------------------------------------

auc_enet <- roc(
  response = enet_pred$obs,
  predictor = enet_pred$Yes,
  levels = c("No", "Yes"),
  direction = "<"
)$auc

auc_rf <- roc(
  response = rf_pred$obs,
  predictor = rf_pred$Yes,
  levels = c("No", "Yes"),
  direction = "<"
)$auc

expr_auc_summary <- tibble(
  model = c("ElasticNet", "RandomForest"),
  auc = c(as.numeric(auc_enet), as.numeric(auc_rf))
)

print(expr_auc_summary)

write_csv(
  expr_auc_summary,
  here("outputs", "tables", "expression_auc_summary.csv")
)
```

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 9. Variable importance
#--------------------------------------------------

enet_varimp <- varImp(model_enet_expr)$importance %>%
  rownames_to_column("feature") %>%
  arrange(desc(Overall)) %>%
  slice_head(n = 20)

rf_varimp <- varImp(model_rf_expr)$importance %>%
  rownames_to_column("feature") %>%
  arrange(desc(Overall)) %>%
  slice_head(n = 20)

print(enet_varimp)
print(rf_varimp)

write_csv(
  enet_varimp,
  here("outputs", "tables", "expression_enet_top_features.csv")
)

write_csv(
  rf_varimp,
  here("outputs", "tables", "expression_rf_top_features.csv")
)
```

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 10. Save model objects
#--------------------------------------------------

saveRDS(
  model_enet_expr,
  here("outputs", "model_objects", "model_enet_expression.rds")
)

saveRDS(
  model_rf_expr,
  here("outputs", "model_objects", "model_rf_expression.rds")
)

write_csv(
  model_enet_expr$results,
  here("outputs", "tables", "expression_enet_full_tuning.csv")
)

write_csv(
  model_rf_expr$results,
  here("outputs", "tables", "expression_rf_full_tuning.csv")
)
```
